summary:
Now let me create the SVG gem icons and the HTML pages:
Now let me write the shared nav partial as a snippet I'll inline in each page, then write all HTML pages:
All files are written. Here's a concise summary:

---

## Gemology Reference Database — Build Complete

### Concept
A jewel-toned dark luxury editorial reference site for gem collectors, jewelry designers, and gemologists. Deep navy/charcoal base (`#1c1c2e`) with saturated gemstone accent colors keyed to each gem family. Gold dividers, serif specimen labels, and editorial density throughout.

### Animation Implemented
The **jewel-tone color-shift animation** on `.gem-classification-card` elements (minerals.html) uses CSS `transition: background-color 600ms ease-in-out, border-color 600ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 600ms ease-in-out` driven by the `data-gem-family` attribute. Eight gem families each have distinct hover states: beryl (→ `#0d3d2e` + `#2ecc71` border), blue-corundum (→ `#0e1f4a` + `#3498db`), red-corundum (→ `#3d0e1a` + `#e74c3c`), amethyst (→ `#2a0e4a` + `#9b59b6`), chrysoberyl (→ `#3d2e00` + `#f1c40f`), diamond, tourmaline, spinel. Cards remain in DOM, in viewport, at fixed size throughout.

### Files Written (18 total)

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `index.html` | Home — hero, stats bar, curated strip, editorial spotlight, taxonomy grid, feed |
| `minerals.html` | Mineral Specimen Index — filterable grid with jewel-shift animation cards |
| `grading.html` | Grading & Certification — tabbed panels, color scales, clarity charts, carat table |
| `cuts.html` | Cutting Styles Gallery — masonry grid, SVG facet diagrams, slide-in drawer |
| `origins.html` | Geological Origins Map — SVG world map, clickable deposit markers, detail panel |
| `glossary.html` | Collector's Glossary — A–Z nav, searchable entries, cross-reference links |
| `certification.html` | Certification Guides — lab cards, comparison table, reading guide, treatment table |
| `about.html` | About the Reference — mission, contributors, methodology, revision log |
| `css/style.css` | Shared stylesheet with all design tokens, animations, and responsive rules |
| `js/main.js` | Navigation, tab switching, filter logic, drawer, map markers, glossary search |
| `img/gem-emerald.svg` | Emerald facet diagram (jewel-tone green) |
| `img/gem-sapphire.svg` | Sapphire facet diagram (jewel-tone blue) |
| `img/gem-ruby.svg` | Ruby facet diagram (jewel-tone red) |
| `img/gem-amethyst.svg` | Amethyst facet diagram (jewel-tone violet) |
| `img/gem-diamond.svg` | Diamond facet diagram (blue-white) |
| `img/gem-chrysoberyl.svg` | Chrysoberyl/cat's eye diagram (gold) |
| `img/gem-tourmaline.svg` | Tourmaline prismatic diagram (teal) |
| `img/gem-spinel.svg` | Spinel octahedral diagram (pink-red) |
| `site_intent.json` | Full implementation manifest with animation spec and design tokens |
